single: The cups contain equal amounts of the same liquid and are mixed in the insulated container. What is the final equilibrium temperature in degrees Celsius?
Assume no heat is lost. Equal amounts of the same liquid are mixed. What integer final temperature in degrees Celsius results?
Using the visible cup temperatures, find the average temperature after the equal liquid amounts are mixed in the insulated container.
The same liquid from all cups is mixed in equal amounts. What final Celsius temperature should the insulated mixer reach?
Average the visible initial temperatures for the equal amounts of liquid. What is the final equilibrium temperature in degrees Celsius?

scene:thermal_mixing_setup.object_description: separate liquid cups with visible Celsius temperature labels being poured into one insulated mixing container

query:single.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around each visible initial temperature label used to compute the final temperature
query:single.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer final equilibrium temperature in degrees Celsius
